description: If a datacenter lists multiple users, allocate the full site to the first listed user to keep the chart MECE, unless an explicit split rule exists.
Fluidstack Lake Mariner is split by building: Buildings 1-2 to G42/Core42 and Buildings 3-5 to Anthropic.
Blank power or H100 fields in the timeline carry forward the prior known value for snapshot calculations.
The monthly chart starts from a synthetic zero baseline at 2023-01-31 so the first anchored year-end point can be paced inside 2023.
Monthly non-anchor totals are generated by smoothstep interpolation between anchor totals, blended with observed site-floor progress using the same formula as the chart builder.
2026-2027 point estimates are analyst judgment values selected within debated ranges; they are not direct additive sums of the linked evidence items.
2028-2029 Anthropic values are conservative forward estimates beyond the high-confidence window; OpenAI 2028-2029 values are rounded site-floor proxies.
